assumptions_and_heuristics.statement: Routes were screened at the evidence-surface level. A route can be included even when individual sources remain metadata-only, licence-constrained, or deferred for later acquisition.

Sources were retained when they exposed game, agent, simulation, execution, provenance, time, process, planning, system-modelling, mapping, or ontology-quality semantics relevant to UOGTO. Retention does not imply parsed RDF availability or semantic equivalence.
The negative-evidence route records searched-but-not-found evidence. Exclusion means no additional releasable source was found for that route, not that the domain was unsearched.

Mapping candidates were generated from deterministic lexical, normalized-label, definition, embedding, structural, property-signature, source-reliability, synonym, exact-IRI, exact-label, and type-compatibility signals.
Accepted mappings are intentionally conservative. Rejected rows remain audit evidence and should not be counted as missing UOGTO concepts without domain review.

Candidate ontology additions are triaged into add, align externally, defer, duplicate reject, out-of-scope reject, or domain review. A domain-review disposition is a stop signal for direct assertion, not a rejection of relevance.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Baseline inventory was already curated and is not a fresh live registry search.
rows.candidate_label: Import completed comparative simulation ontology mapping inventory as Phase 2 baseline.
rows.rationale: Preserves the completed comparison baseline before appending new article-hardening candidates.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Method/tool records support reporting and validation design, not ontology overlap counts.
rows.candidate_label: SSSOM ROBOT OAEI ontology mapping standard review publication
rows.linked_artifact: SSSOM, ROBOT, and OAEI mapping-method surfaces
rows.rationale: Adds mapping publication, review, and quality-method sources needed to harden UOGTO mapping evidence.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Some sources are literature-only or repository-version dependent; exact artifact acquisition is deferred to Phase 3.
rows.candidate_label: GDL GDL-II GDL-III GDLZ Ludii VGDL General Video Game AI game description language
rows.linked_artifact: Game description language and game AI project sites
rows.rationale: Adds game-description and game-AI formalism sources likely to expose rule, move, state, imperfect-information, and execution gaps.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Several standards have metadata-only or restricted redistribution status until licence review.
rows.candidate_label: PNML BPMN OWL-S PDDL Petri net process planning ontology simulation standard
rows.linked_artifact: Simulation, process, planning, and workflow standards
rows.rationale: Adds process, Petri-net, service/action, and planning standards adjacent to UOGTO simulation and execution semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Domain-specific sources must be framed as modelling/simulation comparators, not game-theory ontologies.
rows.candidate_label: SBML SBO CellML SBGN SED-ML KiSAO MIASE simulation ontology standard
rows.rationale: Adds systems-biology modelling standards relevant to simulation experiments, algorithms, model dynamics, and reporting.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Primarily adjacent modelling-language evidence; term-level mappings require later acquisition and review.
rows.candidate_label: Modelica FMI SysML co-simulation physical modelling ontology standard
rows.linked_artifact: Physical modelling, co-simulation, and systems engineering standards
rows.rationale: Adds continuous, hybrid, co-simulation, and systems-modelling sources for dynamic-game and digital-twin coverage analysis.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: The route was intentionally broad and did not surface a releasable ontology artifact for the queried scope.
rows.candidate_label: game theory ontology OR game theory OWL OR game theory RDF registry repository
rows.linked_artifact: Game-theory ontology registry and repository sweep
rows.rationale: Targeted searches across registries, repositories, and documentation surfaces found no additional relevant ontology or formalism to include for this route.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: BFO is relevant as an upper ontology for interpreting overlap with process, object, role, and temporal semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Standards licensing may prevent local redistribution.
rows.rationale: BPMN event, activity, gateway, and process constructs provide useful comparator evidence for execution/workflow semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Domain-specific standard; avoid treating it as game-theory evidence.
rows.rationale: CellML is relevant for mathematical model structure and simulation context comparisons.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.candidate_label: DEVS formalism and DEVS metamodel resources
rows.rationale: DEVS concepts such as atomic/coupled models, events, state transitions, and simulation time overlap UOGTO dynamics and execution traces.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: DOLCE provides foundational categories useful when comparing events, qualities, agents, and social objects across modelling ontologies.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: EMMO is a modelling-oriented upper/reference ontology used by materials modelling and simulation ontology ecosystems.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Interface standard, not a standalone ontology source.
rows.rationale: FMI is relevant to simulator coupling, model exchange, and co-simulation bindings.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: The Game Ontology Project is a structured game concept vocabulary relevant to UOGTO's game specification and outcome concepts.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Likely literature-only until a stable public specification artifact is acquired.
rows.rationale: These GDL variants are relevant for imperfect information, epistemic, and extended game-description constructs that may expose UOGTO gaps.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.candidate_label: Game Description Language and GDL resources
rows.rationale: Game Description Language models game rules, states, legal moves, and terminal conditions that overlap UOGTO rules/actions/outcomes.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Benchmark artifacts vary by version and repository; record exact release before acquisition.
rows.candidate_label: General Video Game AI and VGDL resources
rows.rationale: GVGAI/VGDL is relevant to executable game descriptions, state transitions, and agent evaluation settings.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.candidate_label: High Level Architecture Federation Object Model resources
rows.rationale: HLA/FOM resources are relevant to distributed simulation object, interaction, federation, and execution interoperability semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: KAoS is relevant to multi-agent permissions, obligations, policy, and agent coordination semantics adjacent to UOGTO deontic and agent modules.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: KiSAO is directly relevant to simulation algorithm semantics and SED-ML algorithm references.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Licence and corpus redistribution need review before source acquisition.
rows.rationale: Ludii game descriptions provide structured cross-game constructs useful for evaluating UOGTO rule and component coverage.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.candidate_label: Minimum Information About a Simulation Experiment
rows.rationale: MIASE provides reporting requirements for simulation experiments that can be compared with UOGTO model/session/trace coverage.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Language/library evidence should be charted separately from ontology evidence.
rows.candidate_label: Modelica language and Modelica Standard Library
rows.rationale: Modelica is relevant to equation-based continuous and hybrid simulation semantics that overlap UOGTO dynamic-game extensions.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Benchmark tracks are heterogeneous and not a single ontology source.
rows.rationale: OAEI is relevant background for reporting ontology mapping evaluation and manual review calibration.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: ODD captures overview/design concepts/details of agent-based models and can be mapped to UOGTO specifications, agents, state, and processes.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: OntoUML/UFO can inform conceptual modelling comparisons for agents, events, relations, roles, and social commitments.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.candidate_label: Ontology for Simulation, Modelling, and Optimization
rows.rationale: OSMO is explicitly about simulation, modelling, and optimization and is likely to overlap UOGTO model/execution/binding semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Recorded as metadata-only until a specific OWL file, checksum, and licence are captured.
rows.candidate_label: OWL-S Semantic Markup for Web Services
rows.rationale: OWL-S process/service concepts are relevant to UOGTO executable action and binding semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: OWL-Time supports temporal intervals and instants relevant to sessions, traces, event timing, and simulation time.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: P-Plan models plans, steps, variables, and executions, overlapping UOGTO executable-game and simulation workflow semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Not a game ontology; relevance should be limited to action/execution semantics.
rows.rationale: PDDL action preconditions/effects and planning constructs are useful comparators for UOGTO action and transition semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Use metadata until standard/schema licence and exact version are captured.
rows.rationale: PNML can support more precise comparison of UOGTO Petri-net examples and discrete-event execution semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: PROV-O overlaps UOGTO execution provenance, traces, activities, agents, generated outcomes, and source attribution.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Method/tool source rather than a comparator ontology; use for methods, not overlap counts.
rows.rationale: ROBOT is relevant to article hardening because it can support ontology report, reasoning, and profile checks in later phases.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Notation standard, not a direct ontology-alignment target at this phase.
rows.rationale: SBGN is relevant as a process/network notation comparator, especially for visualizing model dynamics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Systems-biology standard; article claims should distinguish biological modelling context from general game-theory scope.
rows.rationale: SBML model/reaction/simulation ecosystem terms are relevant to UOGTO dynamic model and executable simulation semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Recorded as metadata-only until artifact URL and licence are pinned.
rows.rationale: SBO provides controlled terms for systems biology model semantics and simulation-algorithm contexts.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: schema.org overlaps UOGTO metadata, creative work, software, dataset, action, and web-discoverability semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: SED-ML describes models, simulations, tasks, data generators, outputs, and KiSAO-backed algorithms that overlap UOGTO execution semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: SSN/SOSA observation, procedure, result, and system semantics can align with simulation observation/output traces.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Specification fields can evolve; TSV outputs should keep a documented SSSOM version and local validation.
rows.candidate_label: Simple Standard for Sharing Ontological Mappings (SSSOM)
rows.rationale: SSSOM directly supports reviewable, publishable ontology mapping tables alongside UOGTO RDF/Turtle alignments.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Use metadata/literature unless a redistributable grammar or corpus is explicitly acquired later.
rows.rationale: GDL captures game rules, legal moves, states, roles, goals, and terminal conditions that overlap UOGTO game specification semantics.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Likely too broad for term-level mapping without a narrow use case.
rows.rationale: SysML is an adjacent systems-modelling standard useful for context around model structure and requirements.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: VIMMP ontologies model services, models, interactions, and marketplace semantics around computational modelling.

rows.assumptions_or_heuristics: Imported from completed ontology-comparison baseline; licence and acquisition status remain as recorded there.
rows.rationale: XMILE captures stock-flow/system-dynamics model structure and is relevant to UOGTO dynamic and simulation modules.
